plan: Trim SPY to 20% to meet concentration limits and reduce broad market exposure.
Increase QQQI to 25% for income and to diversify away from high-beta tech.
Sell QQQ, SMH, SOXL, and SPAL to exit all flagged positions and leveraged ETFs.
Reduce CRWD to 10% to lower single-stock risk.
This plan prioritizes capital preservation and reduces overall portfolio risk.
A significant portion of the book will be held as cash for buffer.
conservative.read: This conservative plan targets a modest ~1.5%/month, focusing on capital preservation and reduced volatility. Expect lower drawdowns but also limited upside potential. Key risks include underperforming in strong bull markets.

moves.note: Reduce income, make room for growth

plan: Trim SPY to 25% and CRWD to 10% to comply with concentration limits.
Sell all flagged positions: QQQ, SMH, SOXL, and SPAL.
Reduce QQQI to 10% to free up capital for growth-oriented positions.
Buy XLF (10%) and AMD (10%) based on strong scanner setups to diversify and add growth.
Maintain a ~10% cash buffer to manage market fluctuations.
This plan balances risk reduction with growth opportunities.
balanced.read: This balanced plan aims for ~2.5%/month, focusing on risk-first growth by reducing leverage and concentration. It blends broad index exposure with quality tech and diversification. Expect moderate drawdowns and growth potential.

plan: Trim SPY to 25% to meet concentration limits.
Sell QQQI, QQQ, SMH, SOXL, and SPAL to exit all flagged positions and underperformers.
Increase CRWD to 20% to press a winning tech position.
Buy XOM (15%), AMD (15%), and META (10%) based on strong scanner setups.
This plan uses higher concentration in top-scoring setups and aims for stretch growth.
Maintain a small cash buffer (~5%) for agility.
aggressive.read: This aggressive plan targets ~4%/month, aiming for stretch growth by concentrating in high-scoring setups. It involves higher risk, including significant potential for larger drawdowns and the inherent decay/rebalancing of leveraged ETFs. Strict stop discipline is crucial.

plan: Trim SPY to 25% and CRWD to 5% to reduce growth exposure and concentration.
Sell QQQ, SMH, SOXL, and SPAL to exit all flagged positions and leveraged ETFs.
Significantly increase QQQI to 30% for a strong income focus.
Buy XLF (10%) to add a stable sector with potential for yield.
This plan prioritizes steady monthly distributions and low drawdown.
A cash buffer will be maintained to manage market fluctuations.
income.read: This income plan targets ~1%/month, prioritizing steady monthly distributions and low drawdown. While aiming for reliable income, distributions are variable and NAV can still fall in selloffs. This is not a savings account, but aims for cash-like income.
